_readme: The repo-wide base layer of generic render knobs every dataset inherits (resolution order: CLI > datasets/<session>/<set>/recipe.json > this file). PENDING the x86 render chain: the previous render-knob schema was WIPED with the arm64 chain (see REDESIGN.md); the new tool-first chain re-seeds this file with its own knob set + per-knob why-notes when it is built. Kept as the placeholder base layer so the per-dataset state model stays intact.
